Only the designated DepositManager contract can mint and burn tokens. burn(address,uint256).details: Only callable by the DepositManager contract

params.amount: The amount of tokens to burn Requirements: - Caller must be the DepositManager contract - from must not be the zero address - amount must be greater than 0 - from must have sufficient balance to burn Emits a {DepositManagerBurn} event
params.from: The address to burn tokens from

constructor.details: Constructor initializes the ERC20 token with custom name and symbol Sets the deployer as the owner of the contract

params.name: The name of the token (defaults to "Cut Platform Token" if empty)
params.symbol: The symbol of the token (defaults to "CUT" if empty)

mint(address,uint256).details: Only callable by the DepositManager contract

params.amount: The amount of tokens to mint Requirements: - Caller must be the DepositManager contract - to must not be the zero address - amount must be greater than 0 Emits a {DepositManagerMint} event
params.to: The address to mint tokens to

setDepositManager(address).details: Only callable by the contract owner

params._depositManager: The address of the DepositManager contract Requirements: - Caller must be the contract owner - _depositManager must not be the zero address Emits a {DepositManagerSet} event

burn(address,uint256).notice: Burns tokens from a specified address

depositManager().notice: Address of the DepositManager contract that can mint and burn tokens

mint(address,uint256).notice: Mints new tokens to a specified address
